items.title:
$MSTR STRC 
Mstr can simply keep raising the dividend on STRC to bring it back. 
Instead of selling a share for $1 and buying $2 in coins they spend 11.5 cents to do it now. 
12 cents? 12.5 cents. Not a big difference to mstr. Huge to STRC buyers. 
So they sell $1.5b in shares. It trades $1T a year.

items.title: What Happens to Your 401(k) and IRA When You Die -- What Heirs Need to Know

items.body: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.

items.title: Google to pay SpaceX $920 million a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
